title: 「Given that 句」句型
titleZh: 「Given that 句」表達「考慮到／鑑於某個事實」
titleEn: Using Given that to introduce a known fact or relevant circumstance

source.file: Sentence Structure 23 - 「Given that 句」表達「考慮到／鑑於某個事實」.pdf
omissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Given that + subject + verb + other information, + main clause

formulas.formula: Given that + subject + verb + other information, + main clause

example: Given that we don’t have enough budget, we have no choice but to choose the simpler plan.
exampleZh: 考慮到我們的預算不足，我們別無選擇，只能選擇較簡單的方案。

examples.en: Given that we don’t have enough budget, we have no choice but to choose the simpler plan.
examples.zh: 考慮到我們的預算不足，我們別無選擇，只能選擇較簡單的方案。
examples.highlight: Given that we don’t have enough budget

meaning.en: Given that introduces a known or accepted fact that should be taken into account before a judgement, decision, recommendation or explanation.
meaning.zh: Given that 先提出一項需要納入考慮的已知或可接受事實，再作出判斷、決定、建議或解釋。

benefits.en: It makes the basis of a decision clear by presenting an important fact before the related decision, recommendation or judgement.
benefits.zh: 清楚交代作出決定的根據：先提出重要事實，再說明因此作出的決定、建議或判斷。

benefits.en: It helps you sound calm and logical because you explain the circumstances that support a conclusion instead of presenting an unsupported personal opinion.
benefits.zh: 令表達更冷靜和有邏輯；先交代需要考慮的情況，使說法更合理，而不是像沒有根據的個人意見。

benefits.en: It connects a fact and its result in one sentence, making their relationship immediately clear.
benefits.zh: 把事實和相關結果連成一句，立即顯示兩項資料之間的關係。

benefits.en: It is useful for recommendations and explanations in compositions, reports, presentations, work emails, group discussions, and explanations of rules or arrangements.
benefits.zh: 適合提出建議和解釋決定，可用於作文、報告、簡報、工作電郵、小組討論，以及解釋規則或安排。

benefits.en: It gives you an alternative to because and since and adds variety to sentence openings.
benefits.zh: 避免反覆使用 because 和 since，提供另一種自然的句首方式，令寫作句式更有變化。

rules.en: Given that must be followed by a complete clause containing a subject and a verb.
rules.zh: Given that 後面必須接完整句子，需要有主語和動詞。
examples: Correct: Given that the shop is closed, we will come back tomorrow.
Incorrect: Given that the closed shop, we will come back tomorrow.

rules.en: Given that normally introduces a known or accepted fact. It is close in meaning to “considering the fact that” or “taking into account that”, and normally does not introduce a purely hypothetical or uncertain condition.
rules.zh: Given that 通常提出已知或可以接受的事實，意思接近 considering the fact that、taking into account that、「考慮到」或「鑑於」；通常不是用來提出純粹假設或不確定的條件。
examples: If it rains tomorrow, the match may be cancelled.
Given that it is already raining heavily, the match has been cancelled.

rules.en: Use a comma after a Given that clause at the beginning of a sentence.
rules.zh: Given that 子句放在句首時要使用逗號。
examples: Given that the road is blocked, drivers must use another route.

rules.en: Because directly states the cause of an event. Given that first introduces a fact to consider before presenting a judgement, decision, recommendation or explanation.
rules.zh: because 直接說明事情發生的原因；Given that 則先提出一項需要納入考慮的事實，再作出判斷、決定、建議或解釋。
examples: Because the budget is limited, we chose the cheaper plan.
Given that the budget is limited, we chose the cheaper plan.

rules.en: Every answer in this exercise uses the sentence-initial pattern “Given that + clause, + main clause”.
rules.zh: 本練習統一使用句首結構：Given that + clause, + main clause。

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using Given that to introduce a known fact or relevant circumstance.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 Given that 改寫以下句子，先提出已知事實或相關情況，再說明決定、判斷、建議或結果。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Because the shop is closed, we need to come back tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 因為商店已經關門，我們需要明天再來。
questions.answer: Given that the shop is closed, we need to come back tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到商店已經關門，我們需要明天再來。
questions.highlight: Given that the shop is closed, we need to come back tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Since Mia is feeling unwell, she will stay at home today.
questions.promptZh: 由於米婭感到不適，她今天會留在家中。
questions.answer: Given that Mia is feeling unwell, she will stay at home today.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到米婭感到不適，她今天會留在家中。
questions.highlight: Given that Mia is feeling unwell, she will stay at home today.

questions.prompt: As the bus is full, we will wait for the next one.
questions.promptZh: 由於這班巴士已經滿座，我們會等下一班。
questions.answer: Given that the bus is full, we will wait for the next one.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到這班巴士已經滿座，我們會等下一班。
questions.highlight: Given that the bus is full, we will wait for the next one.

questions.prompt: Because it is raining heavily, the match has been cancelled.
questions.promptZh: 因為正下着大雨，比賽已經取消。
questions.answer: Given that it is raining heavily, the match has been cancelled.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到正下着大雨，比賽已經取消。
questions.highlight: Given that it is raining heavily, the match has been cancelled.

questions.prompt: Since Tom has already finished his homework, he can watch television.
questions.promptZh: 由於湯姆已經完成家課，他可以看電視。
questions.answer: Given that Tom has already finished his homework, he can watch television.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到湯姆已經完成家課，他可以看電視。
questions.highlight: Given that Tom has already finished his homework, he can watch television.

questions.prompt: As there is no milk left, I will go to the supermarket.
questions.promptZh: 由於牛奶已經用完，我會去超級市場。
questions.answer: Given that there is no milk left, I will go to the supermarket.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到牛奶已經用完，我會去超級市場。
questions.highlight: Given that there is no milk left, I will go to the supermarket.

questions.prompt: Because the road is blocked, drivers must use another route.
questions.promptZh: 因為道路受阻，駕駛者必須使用另一條路線。
questions.answer: Given that the road is blocked, drivers must use another route.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到道路受阻，駕駛者必須使用另一條路線。
questions.highlight: Given that the road is blocked, drivers must use another route.

questions.prompt: The room is small, so we cannot invite many people.
questions.promptZh: 房間很小，所以我們不能邀請太多人。
questions.answer: Given that the room is small, we cannot invite many people.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到房間很小，我們不能邀請太多人。
questions.highlight: Given that the room is small, we cannot invite many people.

questions.prompt: The library is quiet today, so we can study there.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館今天很安靜，所以我們可以在那裏溫習。
questions.answer: Given that the library is quiet today, we can study there.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到圖書館今天很安靜，我們可以在那裏溫習。
questions.highlight: Given that the library is quiet today, we can study there.

questions.prompt: Why are we going to take a taxi? The last bus has already left.
questions.promptZh: 我們為甚麼打算乘的士？尾班巴士已經開走了。
questions.answer: Given that the last bus has already left, we are going to take a taxi.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到尾班巴士已經開走了，我們打算乘的士。
questions.highlight: Given that the last bus has already left, we are going to take a taxi.

questions.prompt: Since the test starts at nine, you should arrive early.
questions.promptZh: 由於測驗九時開始，你應該提早到達。
questions.answer: Given that the test starts at nine, you should arrive early.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到測驗九時開始，你應該提早到達。
questions.highlight: Given that the test starts at nine, you should arrive early.

questions.prompt: Because Ella does not understand the instructions, the teacher will explain them again.
questions.promptZh: 因為艾拉不明白指示，老師會再解釋一次。
questions.answer: Given that Ella does not understand the instructions, the teacher will explain them again.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到艾拉不明白指示，老師會再解釋一次。
questions.highlight: Given that Ella does not understand the instructions, the teacher will explain them again.

questions.prompt: As the restaurant is very busy, our food may take longer to arrive.
questions.promptZh: 由於餐廳非常繁忙，我們的食物可能需要較長時間才送到。
questions.answer: Given that the restaurant is very busy, our food may take longer to arrive.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到餐廳非常繁忙，我們的食物可能需要較長時間才送到。
questions.highlight: Given that the restaurant is very busy, our food may take longer to arrive.

questions.prompt: We have only one computer, so we need to take turns.
questions.promptZh: 我們只有一部電腦，所以需要輪流使用。
questions.answer: Given that we have only one computer, we need to take turns.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到我們只有一部電腦，我們需要輪流使用。
questions.highlight: Given that we have only one computer, we need to take turns.

questions.prompt: The weather forecast says there will be strong winds. Therefore, the ferry service may be delayed.
questions.promptZh: 天氣預報指出將會有強風。因此，渡輪服務可能會延誤。
questions.answer: Given that the weather forecast says there will be strong winds, the ferry service may be delayed.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到天氣預報指出將會有強風，渡輪服務可能會延誤。
questions.highlight: Given that the weather forecast says there will be strong winds, the ferry service may be delayed.

questions.prompt: Considering that Ben is new to the team, we should give him more support.
questions.promptZh: 考慮到本是團隊的新成員，我們應該給他更多支援。
questions.answer: Given that Ben is new to the team, we should give him more support.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到本是團隊的新成員，我們應該給他更多支援。
questions.highlight: Given that Ben is new to the team, we should give him more support.

questions.prompt: In view of the fact that the lift is out of order, visitors should use the stairs.
questions.promptZh: 鑑於升降機發生故障，訪客應該使用樓梯。
questions.answer: Given that the lift is out of order, visitors should use the stairs.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到升降機發生故障，訪客應該使用樓梯。
questions.highlight: Given that the lift is out of order, visitors should use the stairs.

questions.prompt: Since the price includes delivery, this offer is reasonable.
questions.promptZh: 由於價格已包括送貨費，這個報價是合理的。
questions.answer: Given that the price includes delivery, this offer is reasonable.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到價格已包括送貨費，這個報價是合理的。
questions.highlight: Given that the price includes delivery, this offer is reasonable.

questions.prompt: Why should Lily bring her passport? The hotel needs to see it at check-in.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉為甚麼應該帶護照？酒店在辦理入住手續時需要查看護照。
questions.answer: Given that the hotel needs to see her passport at check-in, Lily should bring it.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到酒店在辦理入住手續時需要查看莉莉的護照，她應該帶上護照。
questions.highlight: Given that the hotel needs to see her passport at check-in, Lily should bring it.

questions.prompt: The baby is sleeping, so please speak quietly.
questions.promptZh: 嬰兒正在睡覺，所以請輕聲說話。
questions.answer: Given that the baby is sleeping, please speak quietly.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到嬰兒正在睡覺，請輕聲說話。
questions.highlight: Given that the baby is sleeping, please speak quietly.

questions.prompt: Because of the heavy traffic, we may arrive late.
questions.promptZh: 由於交通擠塞，我們可能會遲到。
questions.answer: Given that the traffic is heavy, we may arrive late.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到交通擠塞，我們可能會遲到。
questions.highlight: Given that the traffic is heavy, we may arrive late.

questions.prompt: Due to a shortage of staff, the clinic will close earlier today.
questions.promptZh: 由於人手不足，診所今天會提早關門。
questions.answer: Given that there are not enough staff, the clinic will close earlier today.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到人手不足，診所今天會提早關門。
questions.highlight: Given that there are not enough staff, the clinic will close earlier today.

questions.prompt: With so little time remaining, we cannot discuss every detail.
questions.promptZh: 剩下的時間很少，我們無法討論每一個細節。
questions.answer: Given that so little time remains, we cannot discuss every detail.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到剩下的時間很少，我們無法討論每一個細節。
questions.highlight: Given that so little time remains, we cannot discuss every detail.

questions.prompt: Because the school hall is being repaired, the concert will be held in the gym.
questions.promptZh: 因為學校禮堂正在維修，音樂會將於體育館舉行。
questions.answer: Given that the school hall is being repaired, the concert will be held in the gym.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到學校禮堂正在維修，音樂會將於體育館舉行。
questions.highlight: Given that the school hall is being repaired, the concert will be held in the gym.

questions.prompt: The laptop battery is almost empty. Therefore, you should save your work now.
questions.promptZh: 手提電腦的電量快要用完。因此，你應該立即儲存工作。
questions.answer: Given that the laptop battery is almost empty, you should save your work now.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到手提電腦的電量快要用完，你應該立即儲存工作。
questions.highlight: Given that the laptop battery is almost empty, you should save your work now.

questions.prompt: Since no one has reported a problem, the system appears to be working properly.
questions.promptZh: 由於沒有人報告問題，系統看來運作正常。
questions.answer: Given that no one has reported a problem, the system appears to be working properly.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到沒有人報告問題，系統看來運作正常。
questions.highlight: Given that no one has reported a problem, the system appears to be working properly.

questions.prompt: Because the medicine may make you sleepy, you should not drive after taking it.
questions.promptZh: 因為這種藥物可能令你昏昏欲睡，服藥後不應駕駛。
questions.answer: Given that the medicine may make you sleepy, you should not drive after taking it.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到這種藥物可能令你昏昏欲睡，服藥後不應駕駛。
questions.highlight: Given that the medicine may make you sleepy, you should not drive after taking it.

questions.prompt: The museum is free on Sundays, so many families visit it then.
questions.promptZh: 博物館逢星期日免費開放，所以很多家庭會在當天參觀。
questions.answer: Given that the museum is free on Sundays, many families visit it then.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到博物館逢星期日免費開放，很多家庭會在當天參觀。
questions.highlight: Given that the museum is free on Sundays, many families visit it then.

questions.prompt: As the main road was flooded, the ambulance had to take a longer route.
questions.promptZh: 由於主要道路水浸，救護車不得不改行較長的路線。
questions.answer: Given that the main road was flooded, the ambulance had to take a longer route.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到主要道路水浸，救護車不得不改行較長的路線。
questions.highlight: Given that the main road was flooded, the ambulance had to take a longer route.

questions.prompt: Why did the manager reject the first proposal? It would cost too much.
questions.promptZh: 經理為甚麼拒絕第一份方案？它的成本會太高。
questions.answer: Given that the first proposal would cost too much, the manager rejected it.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到第一份方案的成本會太高，經理拒絕了它。
questions.highlight: Given that the first proposal would cost too much, the manager rejected it.

questions.prompt: Since the old printer often breaks down, the office is going to replace it.
questions.promptZh: 由於舊打印機經常故障，辦公室打算更換它。
questions.answer: Given that the old printer often breaks down, the office is going to replace it.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到舊打印機經常故障，辦公室打算更換它。
questions.highlight: Given that the old printer often breaks down, the office is going to replace it.

questions.prompt: The team has already met its monthly target. As a result, the manager may end the campaign early.
questions.promptZh: 團隊已經達到每月目標。因此，經理可能會提早結束這項推廣活動。
questions.answer: Given that the team has already met its monthly target, the manager may end the campaign early.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到團隊已經達到每月目標，經理可能會提早結束這項推廣活動。
questions.highlight: Given that the team has already met its monthly target, the manager may end the campaign early.

questions.prompt: Because several students were absent, the teacher postponed the group presentation.
questions.promptZh: 因為數名學生缺席，老師押後了小組匯報。
questions.answer: Given that several students were absent, the teacher postponed the group presentation.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到數名學生缺席，老師押後了小組匯報。
questions.highlight: Given that several students were absent, the teacher postponed the group presentation.

questions.prompt: Owing to the fact that the bridge is unsafe, it will remain closed.
questions.promptZh: 由於這座橋並不安全，它將繼續封閉。
questions.answer: Given that the bridge is unsafe, it will remain closed.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到這座橋並不安全，它將繼續封閉。
questions.highlight: Given that the bridge is unsafe, it will remain closed.

questions.prompt: The customer has not received the parcel, so we need to check the delivery record.
questions.promptZh: 顧客尚未收到包裹，所以我們需要查看送貨紀錄。
questions.answer: Given that the customer has not received the parcel, we need to check the delivery record.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到顧客尚未收到包裹，我們需要查看送貨紀錄。

questions.prompt: Now that the children know the safety rules, they can use the equipment more independently.
questions.promptZh: 既然孩子們現在已經知道安全規則，他們可以更獨立地使用設備。
questions.answer: Given that the children now know the safety rules, they can use the equipment more independently.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到孩子們現在已經知道安全規則，他們可以更獨立地使用設備。
questions.highlight: Given that the children now know the safety rules, they can use the equipment more independently.

questions.prompt: The air quality is poor today. For this reason, outdoor activities should be limited.
questions.promptZh: 今天的空氣質素欠佳。因此，戶外活動應該受到限制。
questions.answer: Given that the air quality is poor today, outdoor activities should be limited.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到今天的空氣質素欠佳，戶外活動應該受到限制。
questions.highlight: Given that the air quality is poor today, outdoor activities should be limited.

questions.prompt: Because the instructions were unclear, several users made the same mistake.
questions.promptZh: 因為指示不清楚，數名使用者犯了相同的錯誤。
questions.answer: Given that the instructions were unclear, several users made the same mistake.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到指示不清楚，數名使用者犯了相同的錯誤。
questions.highlight: Given that the instructions were unclear, several users made the same mistake.

questions.prompt: Since the meeting will be online, nobody needs to travel to the office.
questions.promptZh: 由於會議將於網上舉行，沒有人需要前往辦公室。
questions.answer: Given that the meeting will be online, nobody needs to travel to the office.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到會議將於網上舉行，沒有人需要前往辦公室。
questions.highlight: Given that the meeting will be online, nobody needs to travel to the office.

questions.prompt: Why can we reduce the order? We still have enough stock in the warehouse.
questions.promptZh: 我們為甚麼可以減少訂貨量？倉庫仍有足夠存貨。
questions.answer: Given that we still have enough stock in the warehouse, we can reduce the order.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到倉庫仍有足夠存貨，我們可以減少訂貨量。
questions.highlight: Given that we still have enough stock in the warehouse, we can reduce the order.

questions.prompt: The hospital expects more patients this winter. Therefore, it is hiring additional nurses.
questions.promptZh: 醫院預計今年冬季會有更多病人。因此，院方正在增聘護士。
questions.answer: Given that the hospital expects more patients this winter, it is hiring additional nurses.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到醫院預計今年冬季會有更多病人，院方正在增聘護士。
questions.highlight: Given that the hospital expects more patients this winter, it is hiring additional nurses.

questions.prompt: Considering that the project is already two weeks behind schedule, we need to make a decision today.
questions.promptZh: 考慮到項目進度已經落後兩星期，我們今天需要作出決定。
questions.answer: Given that the project is already two weeks behind schedule, we need to make a decision today.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到項目進度已經落後兩星期，我們今天需要作出決定。
questions.highlight: Given that the project is already two weeks behind schedule, we need to make a decision today.

questions.prompt: Because the new software has not been fully tested, staff should continue using the old system for important tasks.
questions.promptZh: 因為新軟件尚未經過全面測試，員工應該繼續使用舊系統處理重要工作。
questions.answer: Given that the new software has not been fully tested, staff should continue using the old system for important tasks.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到新軟件尚未經過全面測試，員工應該繼續使用舊系統處理重要工作。
questions.highlight: Given that the new software has not been fully tested, staff should continue using the old system for important tasks.

questions.prompt: The town has very limited parking near the station. For that reason, visitors are encouraged to use public transport.
questions.promptZh: 車站附近的泊車位非常有限。因此，當局鼓勵訪客使用公共交通工具。
questions.answer: Given that parking near the station is very limited, visitors are encouraged to use public transport.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到車站附近的泊車位非常有限，當局鼓勵訪客使用公共交通工具。
questions.highlight: Given that parking near the station is very limited, visitors are encouraged to use public transport.

questions.prompt: Since the evidence is incomplete, we cannot reach a firm conclusion yet.
questions.promptZh: 由於證據並不完整，我們暫時無法得出確切結論。
questions.answer: Given that the evidence is incomplete, we cannot reach a firm conclusion yet.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到證據並不完整，我們暫時無法得出確切結論。
questions.highlight: Given that the evidence is incomplete, we cannot reach a firm conclusion yet.

questions.prompt: There is a chance that demand will fall next month, so the company should avoid ordering too much stock.
questions.promptZh: 下個月的需求可能會下降，所以公司應避免訂購過多存貨。
questions.answer: Given that there is a chance that demand will fall next month, the company should avoid ordering too much stock.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到下個月的需求可能會下降，公司應避免訂購過多存貨。
questions.highlight: Given that there is a chance that demand will fall next month, the company should avoid ordering too much stock.

questions.prompt: The community centre serves people of all ages. Therefore, its new website must be easy for everyone to use.
questions.promptZh: 社區中心為各個年齡層的人提供服務。因此，其新網站必須方便所有人使用。
questions.answer: Given that the community centre serves people of all ages, its new website must be easy for everyone to use.

questions.highlight: Given that the community centre serves people of all ages, its new website must be easy for everyone to use.

questions.prompt: As the repairs may take several days, passengers should check the latest train information before travelling.
questions.promptZh: 由於維修工程可能需時數天，乘客出發前應查看最新的列車資訊。
questions.answer: Given that the repairs may take several days, passengers should check the latest train information before travelling.

questions.prompt: The school has received more applications than expected, so it may need to open another class.
questions.promptZh: 學校收到的申請比預期多，所以可能需要增設一班。
questions.answer: Given that the school has received more applications than expected, it may need to open another class.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到學校收到的申請比預期多，校方可能需要增設一班。
questions.highlight: Given that the school has received more applications than expected, it may need to open another class.

questions.prompt: The budget has been reduced, the deadline cannot be changed, and only three staff members are available. Therefore, we have to choose the simplest workable plan.
questions.promptZh: 預算已經削減，限期不能更改，而且只有三名員工可以參與。因此，我們必須選擇最簡單而可行的方案。
questions.answer: Given that the budget has been reduced, the deadline cannot be changed, and only three staff members are available, we have to choose the simplest workable plan.
questions.answerZh: 考慮到預算已經削減、限期不能更改，而且只有三名員工可以參與，我們必須選擇最簡單而可行的方案。
